title: quantile() and median() commands crash when used 2x on the same variable on a null table
poc: CREATE TABLE tempa ( one double , two integer ) ;
SELECT quantile( one , 0.25 ) , quantile( one , 0.5 ) FROM tempa WHERE two > 2 ;
key_bug_features: quantile() and median() on null table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table ( id integer PRIMARY KEY, value double, description text );
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, NULL, 'first'), (2, NULL, 'second'), (3, 1.5, 'third');
CREATE TABLE another_table ( ref_id integer REFERENCES test_table(id), score double );
INSERT INTO another_table VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 2.5), (3, NULL);
SELECT quantile(value, 0.25), quantile(value, 0.5) FROM test_table WHERE id > 3;
